name: RobCo
description: The original RobCo Industries terminal presentation. Features the iconic ROBCO INDUSTRIES header, bracket-wrapped menus, and full-row selection highlighting.

options_schema.label: Menu Alignment
options_schema.description: How menu items are aligned on screen.

options_schema.label: Selection Style
options_schema.description: How the selected menu item is highlighted.

options_schema.label: Selection Marker
options_schema.description: Text prefix for the selected item.

options_schema.label: Show Header
options_schema.description: Display the ROBCO INDUSTRIES branding header at the top.

options_schema.label: Underline Subtitle
options_schema.description: Draw an underline below the subtitle text.

options_schema.label: Content Margin
options_schema.description: Columns of margin on each side of content.

options_schema.label: Menus Between Brackets
options_schema.description: Wrap menu items in square brackets (e.g., [Option]).

options_schema.label: Extended Highlighting
options_schema.description: Extend selection highlight to fill the full row width.
